sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101400" key="sussarkwtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συσσαρκ-ωτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n101400.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">depending on</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συσσάρκωσις, ἀποθεραπείας τρόπος οὐκ ἔναιμος ἀλλὰ ς</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:15:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.15.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
